result:
**Goal: Add a "stamp" mode that lets you pick a pattern from the library and place it at the cursor position without clearing the existing grid.**

Currently, loading a pattern from the menu (`p`) wipes the entire grid. A stamp mode (e.g., bound to `t`) would open the pattern selector and, on selection, overlay the chosen pattern centered on the current cursor — leaving all existing cells intact. This enables composing complex scenes by stamping multiple patterns together (e.g., placing several gliders aimed at each other, or building a glider gun next to an eater).
